ℹ️ WHS formula: Index × (Slope ÷ 113) + (Rating − Par). Each player's CH × their format %, summed and rounded.

Legal & Privacy

Who we are

Parmate is a WHS-correct scramble handicap platform operated by The Ninth Tee, registered in the Netherlands (KvK: 98566903).

Our app is available at play.parmate.golf.

Contact: privacy@theninthtee.com

What data we collect

  • Account data — email address, display name (provided at registration via Google Sign-In or email/password)
  • Profile data — handicap index, home course, avatar selection (voluntarily provided by you)
  • Usage data — saved courses, teams, scorecards, match history (stored to provide the service)
  • Technical data — device type, browser, Firebase session tokens (automatically collected by Firebase)

We do not collect location data, payment card data, or sell your data to third parties.

How we use your data

  • To provide and improve the Parmate service
  • To enable multiplayer match play between users
  • To allow users to find and connect with other golfers ("buddies")
  • To calculate WHS-correct scramble handicaps

Legal basis (GDPR Art. 6): Performance of a contract (providing the service you signed up for) and Legitimate interest (improving the app).

Third-party services

  • Google Firebase (Authentication + Firestore) — your data is stored on Google's EU servers. See Firebase Privacy Policy.
  • Netlify — app hosting. See Netlify Privacy Policy.

No advertising, analytics, or tracking services are used.

Your rights (GDPR)

Under EU/EEA law you have the right to:

  • Access — request a copy of your personal data
  • Rectification — correct inaccurate data (via Profile settings)
  • Erasure — request deletion of your account and all associated data
  • Portability — receive your data in a structured format
  • Objection — object to processing based on legitimate interest

To exercise any right, email privacy@theninthtee.com or use the button below.

Data retention

Your data is retained as long as your account is active. Rounds and matches are stored indefinitely to preserve your history. You may delete your account at any time.

Data deletion request

Tap below to send a deletion request. We will permanently delete your account and all associated data within 30 days.

Last updated

April 2026 · Version 0.9 Beta

This policy will be updated when the Google Play Store app launches. Users will be notified of material changes.

Operator

The Ninth Tee
Rijswijkstraat 199
1062 XL Amsterdam
Netherlands
KvK (Chamber of Commerce): 98566903
Email: legal@theninthtee.com

Product

Parmate — WHS-correct scramble handicap calculator
Available at: play.parmate.golf
Platform: Progressive Web App (PWA) · Google Play Store (upcoming)

Parmate will also be available as a downloadable app via the Google Play Store. When this transition occurs, these terms remain in effect. Any material changes will be communicated in advance.

Applicable law

This service is governed by the laws of the Netherlands. Any disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of Dutch courts.

Parmate complies with applicable EU regulations including the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the Dutch Telecommunications Act (Telecommunicatiewet).

Disclaimer

Parmate provides handicap calculations based on the World Handicap System (WHS). Results are indicative and for recreational use only. They are not official WHS handicap records. The Ninth Tee accepts no liability for decisions made based on calculated handicaps.

The app is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Ninth Tee reserves the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the service at any time.

Intellectual property

All content, design, branding, and software within Parmate are the property of The Ninth Tee. Unauthorised reproduction or distribution is prohibited.

Contact

For questions or complaints: legal@theninthtee.com

Our cookie policy

Parmate uses no advertising cookies, no tracking pixels, and no third-party analytics.

What we do use

  • Firebase session tokens — stored in your browser's local storage to keep you signed in. These are strictly necessary for the app to function.
  • PWA cache — the app is cached by your browser's service worker for offline access. This stores app code only, not personal data.

No consent banner required

Because we use only strictly necessary session tokens (no analytics, no advertising, no profiling), we are not required to show a cookie consent banner under the ePrivacy Directive or Dutch Telecommunications Act.

How to clear

You can clear all stored session data by signing out of the app and clearing your browser's site data in your device settings. This will sign you out of Parmate.

Last updated

April 2026

Parmate by The Ninth Tee · KvK 98566903 · v1.0
👑
What's New in Parmate
Beta v0.9 — April 2026
⚔️
Live Match Play
Challenge another team to a real-time scramble match. Generate a QR code or 5-character join code, track scores hole by hole, and see your opponent's progress live.
🏌️
Buddy System
Find other players by name or email, send buddy requests, and build your network. Buddies appear in your team picker for fast setup.
👥
Team Profiles (2P / 3P / 4P)
Create permanent teams from your buddies and save them to My Scramble. Load any saved team into the calculator or match setup in one tap.
📍
Shared Course Database
Browse and load Benelux courses with full WHS data — rating, slope, par per hole, stroke index, and multiple tee options. Contribute courses to the shared database.
🧮
WHS-Correct Calculations
Full 2P, 3P, and 4P scramble formats with configurable allowance percentages, following the official World Handicap System formula.
👤
Player Profiles & Avatars
Set your display name, handicap index, home course, and choose an avatar. Your profile is visible to other players when they search for buddies.
📜
Legal & Privacy
Full GDPR-compliant privacy policy, legal notice, and cookie policy — find them any time via your profile.
⚡ Beta Notice
This is a beta release. Some features are still being refined. Found a bug? Email feedback@theninthtee.com

Add Course
Step 2 / 5
Loop = a set of holes played in one round. A 9-hole course has 1 loop. An 18-hole course can be 1 loop of 18 or 2 loops of 9 (e.g. front 9 + back 9).
